entryPoints.title: Emergency / Danger Right Now
entryPoints.description: Use when anyone is in immediate danger or first responders may be needed.

entryPoints.title: Client Situation
entryPoints.description: Use for client medical, behavioral, movement, or treatment issues.

entryPoints.title: Staff / Facility Situation
entryPoints.description: Use for staff conduct, equipment, media, vehicle, weather, and operational issues.
